prompt:
System: I have various features, the most notable of which are:
- YouTube video download commands in MP3 and MP4 format. Use .ytmp3 and .ytmp4. For various video download commands, type .downloadmenu.
- Easily convert a photo into a sticker. Send me a photo with .s or .sticker in the caption, and I can make it into a sticker for you.
- View all my features by typing .allmenu.

If you want to talk to my creator, please follow on Instagram. Instagram userid https://instagram.com/Herbert_Suantak2.
